en: Bar at shoulder level, grip just outside shoulders.
Brace core, press bar straight up overhead.
Lock out arms, head through window at top.
Lower under control to clavicles.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩高, 握距略宽于肩.
核心收紧, 垂直推举过头.
顶部锁定手臂, 头部穿过.

en: Don't hyperextend lower back at lockout.
Squeeze glutes to protect spine.
zh-Hans: 顶部锁定时不要过度反弓下背.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press up until arms fully extended.
Lower slowly to shoulder level.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在肩高.
向上推至手臂完全伸直.

en: Keep core tight — no lower back arch.
zh-Hans: 核心绷紧 — 不要反弓下背.

en: Sit on upright bench, back supported.
Dumbbells at shoulder height, palms forward.
Press up to lockout, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐直立卧推凳, 背部贴靠.
哑铃在肩高, 掌心朝前.
推至锁定, 控制下放.

en: Upright bench inside rack, bar at shoulder height.
Grip just outside shoulders.
Press up to lockout — no lower back arch.
Lower to clavicles.
zh-Hans: 直立卧推凳放架内, 杠铃在肩高.
推至锁定 — 下背不反弓.

en: Brace core hard — don't let lower back overarch.
zh-Hans: 核心绷紧 — 下背不要过度反弓.

en: Stand with heels together, strict military stance.
Bar at front of shoulders, narrow grip.
Press strictly overhead — no leg drive.
Control bar back to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 脚跟并拢, 军姿站立.
杠铃在肩前, 较窄握距.
严格推举过头 — 不借腿力.

en: Strict form means no leg drive — use lighter weight.
Brace core, no back arch.
zh-Hans: 严格动作不借腿力 — 用较轻重量.
核心绷紧, 不要反弓.

en: Bar at front of shoulders, feet hip-width.
Quick dip with knees, drive up with legs.
Press bar overhead as legs lock out.
Lower back to shoulders under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩前, 脚与髋同宽.
膝盖快速下蹲, 腿部发力上推.
腿伸直时推举杠铃过头.

en: Time the leg drive — too late wastes momentum.
Don't push through pressed-out elbows.
zh-Hans: 腿部发力时机 — 太晚浪费动量.

en: Dumbbells at shoulders, feet hip-width.
Quick dip and drive with legs.
Press dumbbells overhead, lock out.
Lower back to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在肩高, 脚与髋同宽.
膝盖快速下蹲, 腿部发力.
推举哑铃过头, 锁定.

en: Don't collapse at the bottom of the dip.
Start with palms facing you at shoulder height.
Rotate palms outward as you press up.
Top: palms forward, arms locked.
Reverse path back to start.
zh-Hans: 起始掌心朝自己, 哑铃在肩高.
上推过程中掌心向外旋转.
顶部掌心朝前, 手臂锁定.

en: Sit upright on bench, dumbbells at shoulders, palms in.
Press up while rotating palms forward.
Lock out at top, reverse to start.
zh-Hans: 坐直立凳, 哑铃在肩高, 掌心朝内.
上推同时掌心向外旋转.
顶部锁定, 原路返回.

en: Sit on floor, legs straight in front.
Bar at shoulders, narrow grip.
Press strictly overhead — no leg help.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 双腿在身前伸直.
杠铃在肩高, 较窄握距.
严格推举过头 — 不借腿力.

en: Requires solid hip flexor mobility.
Brace core, no back arch.
zh-Hans: 需要良好的髋屈肌灵活性.
核心绷紧, 不要反弓.

en: Sit on floor, legs straight forward.
Dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press overhead — keep torso vertical.
Control back down.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 双腿在身前伸直.
推举过头 — 躯干保持垂直.

en: Don't lean back to compensate for tight hip flexors.
zh-Hans: 不要因髋屈肌紧而向后倾.

en: Stand facing landmine, end of bar at shoulder.
Hold bar with one hand, palm in.
Press up and slightly forward.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立面对地雷管, 杆端在肩上.
单手握杆, 掌心朝内.

en: Half-kneel facing landmine.
Hold bar end at shoulder, opposite hand on hip.
Press up and forward, lock out.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 杆端在肩, 对侧手叉腰.

en: Down knee opposite pressing arm.
Bar end at shoulder, ribs over hips.
Press, resist rotation, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 推举臂同侧腿在前, 异侧膝跪地.
杆端在肩, 胸腹叠加.
推举, 抗旋转, 缓慢下放.

en: Bar at shoulder height in Smith, grip outside shoulders.
Unrack, press straight up to lockout.
Lower under control to shoulder level.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杆在肩高, 握距略宽于肩.
解锁, 垂直推至锁定.

en: Adjust bench position so bar path is in front, not behind head.
zh-Hans: 调整凳位让杆路径在头前, 不在脑后.

en: Upright bench inside Smith rack, bar at chin height.
Grip just outside shoulders.
Press straight up, lower to chin level.
zh-Hans: 直立凳放史密斯架内, 杆在下巴高.
垂直推举, 下放至下巴.

en: Adjust seat so handles at shoulder height.
Grip handles, press straight up to lockout.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 调整座位让手柄在肩高.
握住手柄, 垂直推举至锁定.

en: Set pulleys low, grab handles at shoulders.
Stand facing away, slight forward lean.
Press both handles up overhead.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 定滑轮低位, 双手握把在肩高.
背对器械, 身体略前倾.

en: Kettlebells in rack position at shoulders.
Press up overhead — bells rotate as you press.
Lock out, lower back to rack.
zh-Hans: 向上推举 — 壶铃自然旋转.

en: Maintain wrist alignment — don't let bells flop back.
zh-Hans: 保持手腕中立 — 壶铃不要后翻.

en: Kettlebell racked at one shoulder.
Press straight up overhead, resist side bend.
Lower to rack, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 垂直推举过头, 抗侧屈.

en: Keep ribs stacked over hips, don't lean.
zh-Hans: 胸腹叠加在髋上, 不要侧倾.

en: Stand tall, dumbbell at one shoulder.
Press straight up — brace core.
Lower with control, alternate or switch.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在一侧肩.
垂直推举 — 核心收紧.
控制下放, 交替或换边.

en: Dumbbells at both shoulders.
Press one up while other stays at shoulder.
Alternate arms each rep.
zh-Hans: 推举一臂, 另一臂保持肩高.

en: Bar on upper traps, wide grip.
Press straight up to lockout.
Lower behind neck only as far as shoulder mobility allows.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方, 宽握.
下放至肩部活动度允许的位置.

en: Requires excellent shoulder mobility — skip if tight.
Don't bounce the bar off neck.
Use lighter weight than front press.
zh-Hans: 需要良好的肩关节灵活性 — 紧不要做.

en: Bar on upper traps, wide grip in Smith.
Press straight up, lower behind neck.
Stop at ear level — protect shoulders.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杆放上斜方, 宽握.
垂直推举, 下放至颈后.
停在耳高 — 保护肩部.

en: Don't go below ear level if mobility is limited.
zh-Hans: 灵活性差不要低于耳高.

en: Stand at landmine handles, both hands.
Press up and slightly forward.
Lock out, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 站立握地雷管把手, 双手.

en: Bar at front of shoulders, shoulder-width grip.
Press just over head, lower behind neck.
Press back over head to front. That's 1 rep.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩前, 与肩同宽握.
推过头顶, 下放颈后.
再推过头回到前. 算1次.

en: Skip if shoulder mobility limited.
Use light weight — focus is constant tension.
zh-Hans: 用轻重量 — 注重持续张力.

en: Kettlebell inverted (bell up) at shoulder.
Crush handle, press strictly overhead.
Lower with control, keep bell balanced.
zh-Hans: 壶铃倒立 (球向上) 在肩.
用力握把, 严格推举过头.
控制下放, 保持平衡.

en: Use very light weight — grip is the limit.
Stop if grip fails — dropped bell is dangerous.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量 — 握力是限制.
握不住就停 — 掉落很危险.

en: Clean log to shoulders, neutral grip.
Dip and drive — push press overhead.
Lock out, lower to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 翻举圆木至肩, 对握.
下蹲发力 — 借力推举过头.

en: Strongman lift — requires coaching for safety.
Don't press from poor rack position.
zh-Hans: 大力士动作 — 需指导.

en: Thick axle bar at shoulders.
Press strictly overhead — grip is hard.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 严格推举过头 — 握力很难.

en: Use straps or hook grip if grip slips.
zh-Hans: 握不住可用助力带或勾握.

en: Bar at front shoulders, feet shoulder-width.
Squat down to parallel.
Drive up explosively — press bar overhead.
Lower to shoulders, repeat.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在肩前, 脚与肩同宽.
爆发起身 — 推举杠铃过头.

en: Maintain front rack — don't lose bar position in squat.
zh-Hans: 保持前架 — 蹲时不要松.

en: Dumbbells at shoulders, feet shoulder-width.
Squat to parallel.
Drive up, press dumbbells overhead.
Lower to shoulders, repeat.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在肩, 脚与肩同宽.

en: Pins set at forehead/sticking point.
Press bar from dead stop to lockout.
Lower to pins, full reset each rep.
zh-Hans: 下放至顶杆, 每次重置.

en: Use safety pins — heavy weight at lockout fails fast.
zh-Hans: 使用安全杆 — 重量大锁定快崩.

en: Stand on band, handles at shoulders.
Press up overhead, lock out.
Control band on the way down.
zh-Hans: 站在弹力带上, 把手在肩.
向上推举过头, 锁定.

en: Kick up to handstand against wall.
Lower head to floor in controlled descent.
Press back up to handstand.
Use wall for safety until practiced.
Stack shoulders over wrists — protect neck.
zh-Hans: 肩对齐手腕 — 保护颈部.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells at sides.
Raise arms out to shoulder height.
Slight bend in elbows, pinky slightly up.
Lower slowly under control.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在体侧.
肘部微弯, 小指略上.

en: Sit on bench, dumbbells at sides.
Raise to shoulder height — no momentum.
Pause, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 上举至肩高 — 不借力.

en: Cable at lowest setting, handle in far hand.
Stand side-on, cable across body.
Raise arm out to shoulder height.
Lower with control — feel the side delt.
zh-Hans: 绳索调最低, 远侧手握把.
控制下放 — 感受中三角.

en: Cable low, stand side-on with cable behind hand.
Raise arm out to side — cable behind back.
Increases tension in stretched position.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 侧站绳在手后.
侧平举 — 绳索从背后过.

en: Stand center of cable station, handles crossed.
Left hand grabs right cable, vice versa.
Raise both arms out to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站在绳索机中间, 手交叉握把.
左手握右绳, 反之亦然.

en: Adjust seat so arm pads align with elbows.
Raise arms out — pads lift to shoulder height.
Squeeze, lower slowly.
Lie on side on bench, top arm holds dumbbell.
Raise arm vertically — strict isolation.
Lower slowly — emphasize stretch position.
zh-Hans: 侧卧凳上, 上臂握哑铃.
垂直上举 — 严格隔离.
缓慢下放 — 重视拉伸位.

en: Sit on incline bench, dumbbells hanging at sides.
Raise arms out to shoulder height.
Greater stretch than standing version.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐上斜凳, 哑铃在体侧下垂.

en: Hold pole/rack with one hand, lean away.
Other hand holds dumbbell down at side.
Raise arm out to shoulder height.
Leaning increases stretch on side delt.
zh-Hans: 一手扶柱/架, 身体远离.

en: Cable at low pulley, hold post with near hand.
Lean body away from pulley.
Far hand raises cable to shoulder height.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 近侧手扶柱.

en: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Lower halfway, raise back up.
Lower fully — that's 1 rep.
Use lighter weight than full reps.
Dumbbells at thighs, palms forward.
Sweep arms out and up in big arc.
Meet overhead, reverse path back.
Continuous tension throughout.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在大腿前, 掌心朝前.
顶部相遇, 原路返回.

en: Stand tall, dumbbell at one side.
Raise one arm to shoulder height.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在一侧.

en: Kettlebells at sides, neutral grip.
Raise to shoulder height — bells hang naturally.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 上举至肩高 — 壶铃自然下垂.

en: Stand on band center, handles at sides.
Raise arms to shoulder height.
Tension increases at top — squeeze.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站在带中, 把手在体侧.
顶部张力更大 — 收紧.

en: Hold plate by rim with one hand at side.
Raise to shoulder height like dumbbell.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 一手扣杠铃片边在体侧.

en: Stand, lean torso slightly forward.
Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Hits side delt at different angle.
Lower with control.
Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Hold at top for 20-60 seconds.
Maintain elbow alignment with shoulders.
Stand tall, dumbbells in front, palms in.
Raise arms up at 45° angle to form Y.
Arms above shoulders, thumbs up.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在身前, 掌心朝内.
手臂高于肩, 拇指朝上.

en: Sit in machine, work one arm at a time.
Raise arm pad to shoulder height.
Squeeze, lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 收紧, 缓慢下放, 换边.

en: Cable at low pulley, far hand grabs handle.
Stand side-on, sweep arm up and out.
Stop at shoulder height.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 远侧手握把.

en: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height.
Hold at top for 2-3 seconds.
Lower slowly under control.
Raise dumbbells higher than shoulder — to ear level.
Elbows lead the movement.
Lower under control.
Activates upper traps too.
Hold pole with near hand, lean fully away.
Cable in far hand at low position.
Raise arm out to shoulder height.
Maximum stretch on side delt.
zh-Hans: 近侧手扶柱, 身体完全远离.

en: Stand tall, dumbbells in front of thighs, palms in.
Raise one or both arms to shoulder height.
Slight bend in elbows.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 哑铃在大腿前, 掌心朝内.
单臂或双臂前举至肩高.

en: Dumbbells at sides, palms facing thighs.
Raise one arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower as other arm raises.
Alternate arms continuously.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 掌心朝大腿.

en: Dumbbells at sides, neutral (hammer) grip.
Raise to shoulder height — thumbs up.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在体侧, 对握 (锤式).
前举至肩高 — 拇指朝上.

en: Bar in front of thighs, shoulder-width grip.
Raise bar to shoulder height — arms straight.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在大腿前, 与肩同宽握.
前举至肩高 — 手臂伸直.

en: Don't use momentum or swing the bar.
Hold plate at 3 and 9 o'clock positions.
Raise plate in front to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 双手扣杠铃片 3 点和 9 点位.

en: Cable at lowest setting, handle in hand.
Face away from pulley, cable behind leg.
Raise arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 绳索调最低, 手握把.
背对滑轮, 绳索在腿后.

en: Rope on low pulley, face away.
Hold rope with thumbs facing up.
Raise rope to forehead height, pull apart.
Lower slowly.
Bar end at hip, both hands wrapped on top.
Raise bar forward and up to head height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 杆端在髋, 双手握杆端.

en: Lie face-down on incline bench.
Dumbbells hanging, palms facing down.
Raise arms forward to ear level.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 哑铃下垂, 掌心朝下.

en: Stand tall, dumbbell in one hand.
Raise arm forward to shoulder height.
Lower slowly, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 站姿挺直, 单手哑铃.

en: Stand on band, handles in front of thighs.
Raise arms forward to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站带上, 把手在大腿前.

en: EZ bar at thighs, narrow inner grip.
Raise bar to shoulder height.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 曲杠在大腿前, 较窄内握.

en: Dumbbells in front, palms facing down.
Raise arms forward to shoulder height.
Lower with control — emphasize front delt.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 掌心向下.
控制下放 — 注重前束.

en: Hold kettlebell by horns with both hands at thighs.
Raise to shoulder height.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 双手握壶铃角在大腿前.

en: Bend at hips, torso nearly parallel to floor.
Dumbbells hang under shoulders, palms in.
Raise arms out to sides — squeeze shoulder blades.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 髋部前倾, 躯干近水平.
哑铃在肩下垂, 掌心朝内.
侧平举 — 收紧肩胛骨.

en: Keep back flat — don't round upper back.
zh-Hans: 背部平直 — 不要弓背.

en: Sit on bench edge, chest on thighs.
Dumbbells under knees, palms in.
Raise arms out, pinky leading.
Squeeze upper back, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在膝下, 掌心朝内.
上背收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Lie face-down on 30-45° incline bench.
Dumbbells hang, palms facing each other.
Raise arms out to sides — pinkies up.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 哑铃下垂, 掌心相对.

en: Sit facing machine, chest against pad.
Grip handles with arms forward.
Pull handles back and out — squeeze shoulder blades.
Return slowly.
zh-Hans: 面对器械坐, 胸贴垫.
向后向外拉 — 收紧肩胛.

en: Rope at face height, palms facing in.
Pull rope to face — split ends apart.
Elbows high, externally rotate.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在脸高, 掌心相对.
拉绳至脸 — 两端分开.

en: Band anchored at face height.
Pull band to face, hands apart.
Squeeze shoulder blades, externally rotate.
Slow release.
zh-Hans: 拉带至脸, 双手分开.

en: Sit on bench, rope at face height.
Pull rope to face, ends apart at temples.
Squeeze rear delts, hold.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 拉绳至脸, 两端分至太阳穴.

en: Hold band in front at shoulder height, arms straight.
Pull band apart — squeeze shoulder blades.
Band touches chest at top of squeeze.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 弹力带在身前肩高, 手臂伸直.
向两侧拉开 — 收紧肩胛.

en: Lie face-down, arms overhead in Y position.
Thumbs up, raise arms off floor.
Hold briefly, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴, 手臂呈Y字举过头.
拇指朝上, 双臂抬离地面.
短暂保持, 缓慢下放.

en: Lie face-down, arms out to sides in T.
Thumbs up, raise arms off floor.
Squeeze shoulder blades together.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴, 手臂呈T字侧伸.
拇指朝上, 双臂抬离地面.

en: Lie face-down, elbows bent at 90° at sides.
Pull elbows back, forearms toward ears.
Forms W shape — squeeze rear delts.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 面朝下趴, 肘部90°在体侧.
肘部后拉, 前臂朝耳.

en: One knee on bench, hand for support.
Dumbbell hangs straight down.
Row dumbbell up and out — elbow flared wide.
Targets rear delt more than back.
zh-Hans: 上拉并外展 — 肘部外展.

en: Rope at shoulder height, palms in.
Pull rope to face, elbows flared high.
Squeeze rear delts, slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在肩高, 掌心朝内.
拉至脸, 肘部高位外展.
后束收紧, 缓慢还原.

en: Stand center of cable station, cables crossed.
Left hand grabs right cable, vice versa.
Pull cables out to sides — like a reverse hug.
Squeeze rear delts, slow return.
zh-Hans: 站绳索机中间, 双绳交叉.
左手握右绳, 反之亦然.
向两侧拉 — 反向拥抱.
后束收紧, 缓慢还原.

en: Face machine, chest on pad, arms forward.
Pull handles back and out.
Squeeze shoulder blades, slow return.
zh-Hans: 面对器械, 胸贴垫, 手臂前伸.
收紧肩胛, 缓慢还原.

en: Cable at shoulder height, far hand grabs handle.
Stand side-on, arm across body.
Pull arm out and back — squeeze rear delt.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在肩高, 远侧手握把.
向外向后拉 — 收紧后束.

en: Lie chest-down on 30-45° incline bench.
Dumbbells hanging, palms in.
Row up with elbows wide, pull to chest level.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 哑铃下垂, 掌心朝内.

en: Bend at hips, kettlebells hang under shoulders.
Raise arms out to sides at shoulder height.
Slow return — keep back flat.
zh-Hans: 髋部前倾, 壶铃在肩下垂.
缓慢还原 — 背部平直.

en: Rope above head, palms facing in.
Pull rope down and apart toward face.
Externally rotate at finish — elbows high.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 绳在头上方, 掌心朝内.
结束位外旋 — 肘部高位.

en: Sit on bench, lean fully forward.
Chest near thighs, dumbbells under knees.
Raise arms out — squeeze rear delts.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 胸近大腿, 哑铃在膝下.

en: Bent over, arms out at sides, elbows 90°.
Rotate forearms up — like a scarecrow.
Hold briefly, lower slowly.
Use very light weight.
zh-Hans: 俯身, 双臂侧伸, 肘部90°.
前臂向上旋转 — 像稻草人.
短暂保持, 缓慢下放.

en: Rope at high pulley, palms facing down.
Pull rope down to chin level, elbows wide.
Squeeze rear delts at end.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 下拉至下巴高, 肘部外展.

en: Band in front at shoulder height, arms forward.
Pull band apart and back — squeeze rear delts.
Slow release.
zh-Hans: 弹力带在身前肩高, 手臂前伸.
向后向外拉 — 后束收紧.

en: Bent over, dumbbells hang under shoulders.
Use slight body english to swing weights out.
Control the descent more than the lift.
Heavier than strict rear delt fly.
zh-Hans: 控制下放, 不控上举.

en: Bar at thighs, shoulder-width grip.
Shrug shoulders straight up toward ears.
Squeeze at top, lower slowly.
Don't roll shoulders.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在大腿前, 与肩同宽握.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Don't roll shoulders — straight up and down only.
Dumbbells at sides, neutral grip.
Shrug shoulders straight up to ears.
Squeeze, lower under control.
Smith bar at thigh level, grip just wider than shoulders.
Shrug straight up toward ears.
Squeeze at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杆在大腿高, 握距略宽于肩.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Bar behind glutes, hands at hip-width.
Shrug shoulders up toward ears.
Hits traps from different angle.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在臀后, 与髋同宽握.

en: Stand inside trap bar, neutral grip.
Deadlift to standing, then shrug.
Squeeze traps at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 硬拉至站立, 然后耸肩.
顶部斜方收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Stand facing low cable, straight bar attachment.
Grip bar in front of thighs.
Shrug shoulders up to ears.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 站面对低位绳索, 直杆把.

en: Bar at thighs, hands slightly wider than shoulders.
Pull bar up along body to chest level.
Elbows lead, stay above bar.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在大腿, 握距略宽于肩.
肘部引领, 在杠铃上方.

en: Don't go above chest level — risks shoulder impingement.
Use wider grip if shoulders feel cramped.
zh-Hans: 不要超过胸高 — 可能撞击肩部.

en: Dumbbells in front of thighs, palms back.
Pull up to chest, elbows lead.
Stop at chest height, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在大腿前, 掌心朝后.
上拉至胸高, 肘部引领.
停在胸高, 缓慢下放.

en: Don't pull above chest level.
Low cable, straight bar at thighs.
Pull up along body to chest.
Elbows higher than wrists.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 低位绳索, 直杆在大腿.

en: Kettlebell between feet, hinge hips back.
Swing up, pull bell to shoulder height.
Elbow high, wide stance at top.
Control descent.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在脚间, 髋后铰链.
向上摆动, 上拉至肩高.
肘部高位, 顶部肩宽.

en: Hip drive — don't use only arms.
zh-Hans: 髋部发力 — 不要只用手臂.

en: Lie on side, top arm holds light dumbbell.
Elbow pinned at 90°, forearm across belly.
Rotate forearm up — keep elbow tight.
Lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 上臂握轻哑铃.
肘部固定90°, 前臂过腹.
前臂向上旋转 — 肘部紧贴.

en: Use very light weight — rotator cuff is small muscle group.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量 — 肩袖肌肉很小.

en: Stand side-on to cable at elbow height.
Far hand grabs cable, elbow at 90° at side.
Rotate forearm out away from body.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 侧站绳索机, 绳在肘高.
远侧手握绳, 肘部90°在体侧.

en: Stand side-on to cable at elbow height.
Near hand grabs cable, elbow at side at 90°.
Rotate forearm in across body.
Slow return.
zh-Hans: 侧站绳索机, 绳在肘高.
近侧手握绳, 肘部90°在体侧.

en: Dumbbells in front, upright row to chest.
Rotate forearms up — bells beside head.
Press overhead to lockout.
Reverse the entire path.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 直立划船至胸.
前臂向上旋转 — 哑铃在头侧.

en: Use very light weight — complex movement.
zh-Hans: 用很轻重量 — 动作复杂.

en: Face lever machine, chest on pad.
Grip handles, arms forward.
Pull handles back to T-position.
Squeeze, slow return.
zh-Hans: 面对杠杆器械, 胸贴垫.

en: 3 sets of dumbbells, heaviest first.
Reps to failure with heaviest.
Drop to next, no rest, reps to failure.
Drop to lightest, final reps to failure.
zh-Hans: 换次重不休息, 做到力竭.

en: 7 reps bottom half (sides to mid).
7 reps top half (mid to shoulder).
7 reps full range.
Use light weight — high TUT.
zh-Hans: 用轻重量 — 高紧张时间.
